title: love
author: june
body:
I fucking hate chasing after somebody I know i'll never have.
I genuinely fumbled the perfect girl, and here I am stuck with these bitches who forces you to live with microcheating to stay in a relationship.
And fyi, Im not a fucking incel either. Stop comparing me to Elliot Rodger, Ill never be like that fucker who was beaten, robbed and cucked.

The two fucking perfect girls I found turned out to be fumbled by me, Or dead. What the fuck can I do. Its complicated, I cant chase the fumbled girl.

I know I'm sooking about relationships but genuinely, I don't have any hopes of having a long term relationship where there's no cheating involved.

Mind you, All these other girls want me for my DICK and they're UGLY as FUCK
